about.title: About BPM Motorsport
about.description: A reliable automotive service center specializing in mechanical repairs for passenger vehicles of all brands. We focus on professional diagnostics, experienced mechanics, honest pricing, high quality workmanship, and customer satisfaction.
services.title: Our Services
service.engine_desc: Complete mechanical engine repairs and overhauls.
service.suspension_desc: Improve vehicle stability and driving comfort.
service.oil_desc: Regular maintenance for optimal engine longevity.
service.tires_desc: Professional mounting, balancing and tire checks.

reviews.title: Customer Reviews
review.1.name: John Newman
review.1.text: Great service! The mechanics quickly found the engine fault and the repair was done professionally at a good price. Highly recommend.
review.2.name: Peter Freeman
review.2.text: I regularly come here for oil changes and tire service. Always perfect and fast communication. Transparent dealings with no hidden fees.
review.3.name: Martin Taylor
review.3.text: Had a problem with my brakes and suspension. The guys at BPM Motorsport fixed everything perfectly. The car drives like new now.
review.4.name: Thomas Cook
review.4.text: Very professional approach. Modern workshop equipment and they really understand what they are doing. Got a clear quote and they met the deadline.
review.5.name: Lucas Happy
review.5.text: Excellent communication. The cooling system repair went without a hitch. I like that they explained exactly what needed to be replaced.
review.6.name: Michael Black
review.6.text: Best auto shop around. Timing belt replacement and service inspection went smoothly. I highly appreciate the clean and modern environment.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long does a repair take?
faq.a1: The duration depends on the repair type. Oil changes and tire services are usually same-day. More complex repairs may take a few days.
faq.q2: Do you repair all car brands?
faq.a2: Yes, we have the expertise and diagnostic tools to service passenger vehicles of all major brands (Skoda, VW, BMW, Audi, Ford, Toyota, etc.).
faq.q3: Can I bring my own parts?
faq.a3: We strongly recommend using our sourced parts to guarantee quality and provide a full warranty on the repair. We cannot offer a warranty on customer-supplied parts.
faq.q4: Is there a warranty on repairs?
faq.a4: Yes, we provide a full warranty on all our mechanical repairs and the original or high-quality aftermarket parts we supply.
faq.q5: How do I book an appointment?
faq.a5: You can book an appointment by calling us directly, sending a WhatsApp message, or sending an email. We will get back to you with a confirmation.
faq.q6: Do you perform seasonal tire changes and balancing?
faq.a6: Yes, we provide complete tire services including seasonal changes, precise wheel balancing, and tire condition checks.
